title: ReferenceResolutionFrontendAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain reference-resolution-substrate-frontend RF4 retrospective to record that the dashboard surface serving the reference-resolution substrate (Context Pull Inspector at /context-pulls — list + drawer + entity-detail integration via the EventTimeline `N references resolved in this prompt` suffix block) has been verified against the chain's design doc and completion criteria. Self-hosting check parallel to TelemetryFrontendAuditCompleted and SubstrateFrontendAuditCompleted — the dashboard surface that surfaces reference-resolution outcomes records its own audit outcome through the events ledger that agent-substrate-frontend's audit ledger renders. Closes the substrate-trilogy-frontend loop end-to-end. Findings are keyed to docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION_FRONTEND.md sections. See docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION_FRONTEND.md and the chain's completion_condition for context.

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the design / contract doc the findings are keyed against — typically docs/REFERENCE_RESOLUTION_FRONTEND.md plus the chain's completion criteria.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome covering all completion-criterion sub-items (a)-(e).

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the follow-on work (typically: T7 cross-encoder per-candidate scoring landing on reference_resolution_emits.ml_confidence_score; transcript-reader for detection.source_message_excerpt; per-candidate detail sub-table; project_id propagation fix). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per design-doc section or completion-criterion item. status uses the same enum as the architecture audit (pass / fail / partial / deferred).

item.description: Design-doc section identifier and short description (e.g. "§3.1 list endpoint").

status.description: pass = contract honored end-to-end; fail = gap (must file follow-on); partial = honored with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope per chain non-goals.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence: test names, file paths, commit SHA, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
